name: @geometra/demo-mcp-radix-fixture
description: React + @radix-ui/react-select fixture exercising the Geometra MCP against the real Radix Select DOM (button trigger with <SelectValue> sibling, portal'd menu). Mirrors the mcp-greenhouse-fixture pattern but with a different combobox library so the extractor's findCustomComboboxValueText sibling-readback is validated against real Radix output, not a hand-coded mock.
